prompt: Ultra-realistic close-up selfie portrait of a young woman indoors at night, captured with a smartphone camera. Soft natural skin with a smooth complexion, subtle rosy cheeks, glossy pink lips, and a playful expression with her tongue slightly touching her upper lip. Large dark expressive eyes looking slightly sideways toward the camera. Medium-length dark brown hair with wispy curtain bangs framing the face. Cozy cream-colored knitted sweater draped around the shoulders. The composition is an extreme close crop, with the face filling most of the frame and partially extending beyond the edges for an intimate candid feel. Warm low-light ambient illumination creates soft shadows and gentle highlights on the skin. Background features a dimly lit apartment interior with large glass windows, faint city lights and reflections visible outside, blurred furniture, and shallow depth of field. Natural smartphone photography aesthetic, slight grain from low-light conditions, realistic skin texture, cinematic mood, cozy late-night atmosphere, authentic candid social-media selfie, ultra-detailed, high resolution, bokeh background, realistic colors, soft focus transitions, 4K photography.
